name: Cambridge University Athletics Track
metaTitle: Cambridge University Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Wilberforce Road Athletics Track in Cambridge.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 07:30–22:00, Sat 10:00–19:00, Sun 09:00–21:00. Note that the facility can be booked for exclusive events.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via membership or pay-as-you-train sessions (approx. £5.00 for community users). Pre-booking is mandatory.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A premier 8-lane 400m synthetic track managed by the University of Cambridge Sports Service at Wilberforce Road.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site car parking is available for users. The car park includes designated Blue Badge parking spaces.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Wilberforce Road Athletics Track, Wilberforce Road, Cambridge, CB3 0EQ

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Sport at Cambridge website for track booking apps and facility updates.
